# Domain Modeling

Use this skill when the change needs clearer business concepts or data boundaries.

## Procedure

1. Identify the core nouns and verbs in the request.
2. Separate entities, value objects, and processes.
3. Write the invariants that must always hold.
4. Map the model to schemas, services, and events if needed.

## Useful Output

- Core concepts
- Invariants
- Boundaries
- Suggested model changes
